mapper.select: SELECT * FROM test_case WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} AND is_sample = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM test_case WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM test_case WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM test_case WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} AND is_sample = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_case (problem_id, input, output, is_sample, sort_order) VALUES (#{problemId}, #{input}, #{output}, #{isSample}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO test_case (problem_id, input, output, is_sample, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.problemId}, #{item.input}, #{item.output}, #{item.isSample}, #{item.sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE test_case SET problem_id = #{problemId}, input = #{input}, output = #{output}, is_sample = #{isSample}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_case WHERE problem_id = #{problemId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_case WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} AND is_sample = 1
